use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF BACTERIAL INFECTIONS IN THE NASAL PASSAGE OF ADULT PATIENTS AND HEALTH CARE WORKERS WITH METHICILLIN RESISTANT S. AUREUS

indications.text:
BACTROBAN® nasal ointment is indicated for the eradication of nasal colonization with
methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA) in adult and pediatric patients (aged 12
years and older) and healthcare workers as part of a comprehensive infection control program to
reduce the risk of infecti...

49 BACTROBAN Ointment is indicated for the topical treatment of impetigo due to: S. aureus
50 and S. pyogenes.
